finding: content-derived instance identities must be unique by (corpus_id, content_id); Entity remains intentionally global

neo4j_entity.current_contract: global entity_id with corpus support accumulated through mentions/relations
neo4j_entity.verdict: intentionally shared; must not be corpus-qualified

writer_and_admin_actions.action: replace by corpus_id + node_id and establish compound index
migrate Document, Chunk, and Fact uniqueness from single-property to corpus-qualified constraints
MERGE by corpus_id + doc_id; never SET corpus_id
MERGE by corpus_id + chunk_id; never SET corpus_id
MERGE by corpus_id + fact_id; fact identity derives from doc/chunk and otherwise collides
use corpus-qualified evidence references so same raw chunk_id in two corpora cannot be removed as one support
MERGE/MATCH Document, Chunk, Fact and their relationships by corpus-qualified properties
snapshot corpus_id with Chunk/Fact references and use it during undo; Entity merge remains global

retrieval_and_api_actions.action: query and score by (corpus_id, chunk_id), not chunk_id
carry seed instance pairs through Neo4j and Mongo; key payload, noise, merge, and cache maps by corpus + chunk
carry winner/evidence instance pairs through both graph walks
hydrate and map chunk/parent/document instances with corpus in the key
noise decisions use corpus + chunk pairs
require the anchor corpus_id with doc_id
internal aggregation/metadata keys use corpus + doc; drill carries drill_corpus_id

services.ingestion graph backfill callers that delegate to neo4j_writer
corpus-filtered graph analytics and graph query scans
global Entity lookup, entity deduplication, and cross-corpus bridge traversal
